title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Archon is an open-source AI coding harness and workflow builder that enables self-building codebases through custom agent workflows. It orchestrates multi-model deployments, combining different LLMs like Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 for specialized tasks.
